benefits.description: Lost weight gained after Hashimoto's diagnosis; weight loss achieved while on Tirzepatide despite previous resistance to calorie deficit and exercise
Noticed difference in overall inflammation; had terrible inflammation and joint pain that improved significantly
Reduction in joint pain; had terrible joint pain that improved
Noticed a difference in energy; still has bad days with fatigue but energy improved from baseline

side_effects.description: Started to get site reactions from BPC/TB500/GHK-Cu and lipo mic/NAD+ stack

protocol_notes: On low dose levothyroxine for approximately 1 year; TSH improved to more optimal level within normal range; tapering off Tirzepatide as it helped significantly; continuing low-dose Tirzepatide for inflammation management; following anti-inflammatory diet; fixed vitamin levels; stack included BPC/TB500/GHK-Cu and lipo mic/NAD+ but encountered injection site reactions; user notes peptides helped immensely with weight loss, inflammation, and joint pain that did not respond to traditional diet and exercise
